hooks.name: neko-block-shell-reads
hooks.description: Optimizes context usage by blocking manual file reads via shell and redirecting to neko's structure-aware read_file tool.

hooks.name: neko-block-shell-writes
hooks.description: Optimizes context usage by blocking manual file writes via shell and redirecting to neko's mcp_neko_create_file or edit_file tools.

hooks.name: neko-block-go-build-test
hooks.description: Enforces quality gates by blocking direct 'go build' and 'go test' commands, redirecting to mcp_neko_build.

hooks.name: neko-block-builtin-read
hooks.description: Blocks the built-in read_file tool and redirects to neko's structure-aware mcp_neko_read_file tool.

hooks.name: neko-block-builtin-write
hooks.description: Blocks the built-in write_file tool and redirects to neko's mcp_neko_create_file tool.

hooks.name: neko-block-builtin-replace
hooks.description: Blocks the built-in replace tool and redirects to neko's mcp_neko_edit_file tool.
